the company is located in tianjin, china, adjacent to the port, radiating the global supply chain. the existing factory covers an area of 33,000 square meters, equipped with 4 intelligent production lines and an annual production capacity of more than 1 million units.

the company takes technological innovation as the core driving force, integrates lean production concept and digital management system, creates an efficient, flexible and sustainable supply chain system, and meets the needs of global customers for product performance, design and environmental protection standards.

the company has a research and development, manufacturing and marketing team with many years of experience in the industry, and deeply understands the requirements of consumers for cycling culture, product quality and personalized services. focusing on high-precision assembly technology and lightweight design, it provides high-end commuting and sports bicycles and electric bicycles for details, durability and extreme riding experience.

the company's vision: redefine the cycling experience with science and technology and become a benchmark enterprise for the intelligent upgrading of the global bicycle industry.

zeno bicycle component co., ltd zeno bicycle component has more than decades of experience in component manufacturing. the brand zeno was established in 2014, specializing in bicycle control parts such as disc brakes, brake rotors, brake pads, hydraulic system parts, cable system parts, and anti-theft parts. we have always listened carefully to the voices of riders, and the feedback of users is reflected in the design of various product functions and details. everything is only to make riding a pure enjoyment. the q-connector series products focus on the convenience of bicycle repair and assembly. the anti-theft parts series solves the problem of parts theft during urban riding. all this is just a tiny thing in riding, but it is a big thing that can not be ignored for zeno driven performance.

zeno bicycle component co., ltd. has launched speedlink q-connector lite hydraulic quick couplings for the fast-growing cargo bike and mainstream hydraulic brakes driven by booming e-commerce. hydraulic brakes provide excellent braking force and delicate control, but maintenance and installation also increase many difficulties. in addition to the special tools required for installation, the specifications of each brand are also different. more importantly, the parts are all disposable products. in particular, the volume and weight of the cargo bike are much larger than ordinary bicycles, and the maintenance and assembly are more complicated.speedlink q-connector lite solves the above problems at one time. it is easy to install and only requires an 8mm open-end wrench. it is suitable for most brake specifications and can be reused. the setup is very flexible you can set it up on the brake lever, brake caliper, or in any middle section of the brake line depending on your bicycle design and function needs.   the oil circuit is automatically closed when the connector is disconnected. it can withstand pressures above 4500 psi. in addition to providing convenience, it also pays attention to the safety of riders. disc brake
